caption: The video appears to be a segment from a show called "Focus with Margaret Harrington," featuring a discussion on climate crisis poems titled "No More Time" by Greg Delanty. The scene is set up as a split-screen interview, with Margaret Harrington on the left and Greg Delanty on the right. Margaret is seated in a room decorated with string lights, while Greg is in a room with a blue wall and an "OPEN" sign visible in the background. Both participants seem engaged in a conversation, likely exploring the themes and emotions conveyed through Greg's poetry. The setting suggests a thoughtful and reflective dialogue aimed at raising awareness about the urgency of addressing climate change.
